notes: Public Health Law & Bioethics scan. 0 niches confirmed blue ocean. 10 duplicates filtered: ['Daily Public Health Law Streak', 'Daily Bioethics Streak', 'Daily Global Health Law Streak', 'Daily Reproductive Rights Law Streak', 'Daily Mental Health Law Streak', 'Daily Vaccine Law Streak', 'Daily End Of Life Law Streak', 'Daily Drug Policy Law Streak', 'Daily Research Ethics Streak', 'Daily Healthcare Regulation Streak']. Key finding: Every niche in this domain (public health law, bioethics, reproductive rights, mental health law, vaccine law, end-of-life law, drug policy, research ethics, healthcare regulation) has ZERO exact-match streak apps despite enormous professional and civic audiences. Reproductive rights law and news-driven niches have 50M+ combined community reach. Research ethics is especially actionable: CITI Program monopoly on captive student/researcher audience with terrible UX (2.9 stars, 420 reviews) — a well-designed streak app could capture this market.
